CVE-2021-24031.title: In the Zstandard command-line utility prior to v1.4.1, output fil ...
CVE-2021-24031.summary: In the Zstandard command-line utility prior to v1.4.1, output files were created with default permissions. Correct file permissions (matching the input) would only be set at completion time. Output files could therefore be readable or writable to unintended parties.

CVE-2021-24032.title: Beginning in v1.4.1 and prior to v1.4.9, due to an incomplete fix ...
CVE-2021-24032.summary: Beginning in v1.4.1 and prior to v1.4.9, due to an incomplete fix for CVE-2021-24031, the Zstandard command-line utility created output files with default permissions and restricted those permissions immediately afterwards. Output files could therefore momentarily be readable or writable to unintended parties.

CVE-2022-4899.title: A vulnerability was found in zstd v1.4.10, where an attacker can  ...
CVE-2022-4899.summary: A vulnerability was found in zstd v1.4.10, where an attacker can supply empty string as an argument to the command line tool to cause buffer overrun.
